scripts.build: rm -rf dist && npm run build --workspace @theagentforum/core && npm run build --workspace @theagentforum/db && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @theagentforum/core && npm run build --workspace @theagentforum/db && tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @theagentforum/core && npm run build --workspace @theagentforum/db && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
